summary: The Grants.gov search2 'agencies' field must be sent as a plain string agency code; the JSON-array form is accepted with errorcode 0 but silently matches nothing.
reason: Live-verified 2026-07-06: agencies:["HHS-NIH11"] returns hitCount 0 while agencies:"HHS-NIH11" returns real hits. Any regen or 'fix' that switches this to an array silently breaks the --agency filter with no error.
validated_outcome: search cancer --agency HHS-NIH11 returns 80 hits (all agencyCode HHS-NIH11) with the string form; 0 hits with the array form.
